text.title: CSF 3 Storybook Story Conventions
text.summary: CSF 3 shape for UI library stories: Meta satisfies, StoryObj, tags autodocs, argTypes with controls, play functions with await, and MDX docs blocks.

rule.statement: Use `satisfies Meta<typeof Component>` for meta and `StoryObj<typeof meta>` for story types. Always include `tags: ['autodocs']` to generate a docs page.
rule.rationale: Omitting tags: ['autodocs'] is the single most common reason a component has no autodocs page in Storybook 8.

rule.statement: Always await userEvent calls inside play functions. Assertions fire before React updates without await, producing flaky tests.
rule.rationale: userEvent is async; without await the DOM state is stale when expect() runs.

rule.statement: Use `parameters: { controls: { exclude: [...] } }` to hide inherited HTML attributes from the autodocs prop table.
rule.rationale: Without filtering, every HTMLButtonAttribute appears in the controls panel, making the useful props invisible.
